whole_story_coherence.note: Full topography exists and continuity flags are tracked.

character_continuity.note: Multiple point-of-view interludes have explicit continuity tracking.

plot_causality.note: Cause-and-effect spine is documented and connected to late-book payoff.

prose_readability.note: House style exists; latest sweep scores the reader edition at 69.208 average after spelling out the Sacred Tongue names and adding off-stage professional presence to exposition-heavy scenes. Ch20 improved from 62.855 to 66.725 after quality-only revision, and interlude-09 closing improved from 62.518 to 73.199 after embodied negative-space revision.

originality_and_reader_value.note: Magic-as-infrastructure and warmth/system rigor are documented differentiators.

portfolio_fit.note: Book fits the broader AetherMoore/Six Tongues catalog direction.

production_readiness.note: Manuscript can build; final visual review is still required before upload.
